mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM song WHERE status = 1) AS songCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM singer WHERE status = 1) AS singerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist WHERE status = 1) AS playlistCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_info) AS userCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(play_count) FROM song WHERE status = 1), 0) AS totalPlayCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(like_count) FROM song WHERE status = 1), 0) AS totalLikeCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(fav_count) FROM song WHERE status = 1), 0) AS totalFavCount

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.cover, si.name AS singerName, COALESCE(s.play_count, 0) AS playCount, COALESCE(s.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(s.fav_count, 0) AS favCount FROM song s LEFT JOIN singer si ON s.singer_id = si.id WHERE s.status = 1 ORDER BY s.play_count DESC, s.like_count DESC, s.fav_count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT si.id, si.name, si.avatar AS cover, NULL AS singerName, COALESCE(SUM(s.play_count), 0) AS playCount, COALESCE(SUM(s.like_count), 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(SUM(s.fav_count), 0) AS favCount FROM singer si LEFT JOIN song s ON s.singer_id = si.id AND s.status = 1 WHERE si.status = 1 GROUP BY si.id, si.name, si.avatar ORDER BY playCount DESC, likeCount DESC, favCount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.cover, NULL AS singerName, COALESCE(SUM(s.play_count), 0) AS playCount, COALESCE(SUM(s.like_count), 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(SUM(s.fav_count), 0) AS favCount FROM playlist p LEFT JOIN playlist_song ps ON ps.playlist_id = p.id LEFT JOIN song s ON s.id = ps.song_id AND s.status = 1 WHERE p.status = 1 GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.cover ORDER BY playCount DESC, likeCount DESC, favCount DESC LIMIT 10
